scripts.core:install: python -m venv services/core/.venv && services\core\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e "services/core[dev]"
scripts.core:test: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$base = Join-Path (Get-Location) ('.tmp\\pytest-' + $PID); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $base | Out-Null; services\\core\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest services/core/tests --basetemp $base"
scripts.release:check: pnpm check && pnpm core:test && cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && pnpm --filter @deyana/desktop build
